titleStmt.title: SII 26.440: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 440. (A.R. No. 419 of 1909.) SIDDHALIṄGAMAḌAM, TIRUKKOYILUR TALUK, SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT.

summary.p: This inscription contains the praśasti of the king commencing with Pugaḻmādu viḷaṅga, etc. and mentions the queen Avanimuḻuduḍaiyāḷ.

It records a gift of 64 cows on behalf of Malaiyamāṉ Śadiraṉ Malaiyaṉ alias Rājēndraśōḻa Malaiyamāṉ of Kiḷiyūr on the southern bank of the Peṇṇai river in Tirumuṉaippāḍi in Dāmar-nāḍu in Rājēndra-vaḷanāḍu for two nandā lamps to be burnt in the temple of the god Tiruppulippagavadēvar of Śiṟṟiṅgūr, a brahmadēyam in Kuṟukkaik-kūṟṟam in Malāḍu alias Jananāthavaḷanāḍu.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . pukaḻmātu viḷaṅka jeyamātu virumpa nilamakaḷ nilava malarmakaḷ puṇara Urimaiyiṟ ciṟaṉta maṇimuṭicūṭi villavar nilaikeṭa miṉavar kulaitara Eṉai maṉ navar Iriyaluṟṟuḻittarat tikkaṉaittun taṉcakkaranaṭātti vijaiyaabhiṣekam paṇṇi virasiṁhāsanattu Avanimuḻutuṭaiyāḷoṭum viṟṟiruntaruḷiya kovi- rājakecaripanmarāṉa tribhu
vaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīkulottuṅkacoḻadevaṟku yāṇṭu 17 Āvatu rājentra- vaḷanāṭṭuttāmar nāṭṭut tirumuṉaippāṭip peṇṇait teṉkaraikkiḷiyūr malaiya māṉ catiraṉ malaiyaṉāṉa rājentra coḻa malaiyamāṉaic cārtti malāṭāṉa jaṉanātavaḷanāṭṭuk kuṟukkaikkūṟṟattu brahmadeyañ ciṟṟiṅkūr Āḷu
ṭaiyār tiruppulippakavadevarkkuc cantrādittavar niṉṟeriya vaitta tirunantāviḷakku 2 Ivviḷakku Iraṇṭu Iraṇṭukkum viṭṭa cāvāmuvāppacu 6 10 4 Itu panmāheśvararakṣai .
Digital edition of SII 26.440 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
